summary: Convergence/reliability gate for numerical results (fits, integrals, eigenvalues, roots/poles): fold only values that are stable under refinement (G1, with coarse-grid mirage detection), agreed across >=2 orthogonal methods (G2), validated by a method-agnostic invariant where available (G3, e.g. argument-principle winding over fixed-seed/threshold heuristics), regression-anchored to a known reference before any variation (G4), and degeneracy-honest (G5). Emits an auditable reliability matrix.

install.claude_code: Packaged install copies this skill into the target Claude Code skills root. Installed copies do not auto-follow repo updates; reinstall or rerun install with --force to refresh. For live repo-tracking development installs, use packages/skills-market/scripts/install_symlink_claude_code.sh against the monorepo skills root; that helper symlinks all market-listed skill-pack entries into the target Claude Code skills root, not only numerical-reliability-gate.
